_comment: Curated overrides for the NOTICE/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES projection (tempdoc 632). The jk1 LicenseBundleNormalizer collapses dual-licensed deps to a single (often the copyleft) license; here we claim each dual-licensed dependency under its PERMISSIVE alternative, which is the license JustSearch actually relies on. These overrides are also the source the Stage-D jk1 allowed-licenses derives from. (junrar/UnRar was removed in tempdoc 632 — the Tika RAR parser is excluded.)

nativeRuntimes.name: llama.cpp
nativeRuntimes.ref: https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/blob/master/LICENSE (prebuilt llama-server binary b8571, downloaded from ggml-org/llama.cpp releases at build time)

nativeRuntimes.name: NVIDIA CUDA runtime (cudart, cuBLAS, cuBLAS Lt)
NVIDIA cuDNN runtime
nativeRuntimes.ref: https://docs.nvidia.com/deeplearning/cudnn/sla/ — governed by the cuDNN SLA, which is SEPARATE from the CUDA Toolkit EULA
